title: V3Unknown leaves partially out of range select in the logic
body:
Given
```verilog
module top(
  input wire logic [2:0] i,
  output wire logic[3:0] o
);
  localparam [4:0] p = 5'h1f;
  assign o = p[i +: 4];
endmodule
```

With `verilator --cc --x-assign unique`, we generate the following due to V3Unkown leaving partially out of range selects in the logic:

```c++
       vlSelfRef.o = (0xfU & ((4U >= (IData)(vlSelfRef.i))
                               ? (0x1fU >> (IData)(vlSelfRef.i))
                               : (IData)(vlSelfRef.top__DOT____Vxrand_h8d94a835__0)));
```

(This fails to randomize the out of range bits when `i` is 2/3/4.)

Mainly filing this for reference in upcoming PR for another bug.
